# Architecture Docs and Diagrams

Use this reference for **D6 — Architecture & Diagrams**.

## Purpose

Explain SDK structure clearly when prose alone is not enough.

## Good Mermaid candidates

- `TorBoxClient` composition
- Main/Search/Relay separation
- request flow from public client to resource client to HTTP layer
- package or namespace overview

## Rules

- One diagram = one idea.
- Prefer diagrams that explain hierarchy or flow, not decoration.
- Diagram labels must match actual or explicitly planned type names.
- If the architecture is still planned, label the diagram as roadmap-oriented.
